[[File:Konar quo Maten chathead.png|left]]
'''Konar quo Maten''' (translated as '''Konar the Hunter''') is a [[Slayer master]] who is found in the [[Kahlith]] settlement on the summit of [[Mount Karuulm]]. Players must have a [[combat level]] of at least 75 to be assigned a [[Slayer task]] from her.

Compared to other Slayer masters, Konar assigns [[wyrm]]s and [[drake]]s more frequently and in higher amounts. Additionally, she is the only Slayer master who can assign [[hydra]]s as a general task and the [[Alchemical Hydra]] as a boss task.

Blocking a task with Konar costs 80 [[Slayer reward point|Slayer reward points]].

==Transportation==
*[[Rada's blessing 3]] or [[Rada's blessing 4|4]]'s teleport takes players to the summit of [[Mount Karuulm]].
*Heading north of the {{Fairycode|CIR}} [[Fairy rings|fairy ring]]
*North of the [[Farming Guild]] teleport (found on the [[Skills necklace]]/[[Farming cape]])
*North of the [[Battlefront Teleport|Battlefront teleport]].
*Using the [[NPC Contact]] spell. Konar is initially unavailable using NPC Contact and must be spoken to first using Talk-to before becoming an option. The right-click "Assignment" option will '''not''' unlock her in NPC contact.

==Slayer points==
Players can receive [[Slayer reward point]]s for completing [[Slayer task]]s—this is based on how many tasks players have accomplished in a row. Completion of a task assigned by Konar will grant players a varying amount of points, depending if they have completed the [[Kourend & Kebos Diary]]. Although she is the third highest Slayer master, she gives the second highest slayer point reward per task due to requiring players to slay in a specific area. The only Slayer master who gives more points is [[Krystilia]], who gives Slayer tasks in the [[Wilderness]].

Konar's blocks cost 80 Slayer points.

==Tasks==
Unlike other Slayer masters, Konar's [[Slayer task]]s also include a specific location where players must complete the entire task. 

After a task has been rolled, a second roll is made to determine the location in which Konar wants the player to complete their assignment. This second roll will check any other additional requirements if a location is locked behind a quest. If the player has not completed the quest that unlocks the respective area, then the task will never be directed there; e.g. a player who has not completed [[Song of the Elves]] would not be offered [[waterfiend]]s at the [[Iorwerth Dungeon]], whereas one who did would have that as a potential location. The chance of being assigned a specific location is equal for each eligible location,{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1621613665072910337|date=3 February 2023|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/101215|archivedate=4 February 2023|quote=Yes, it's an equal chance for each of the areas you're eligible to access.}} barring the [[Wilderness]] unless it is part of a boss task (e.g. [[Vet'ion]] task), since [[Krystilia]] specializes in that area.

Bosses that are part of the slayer task area can be killed if offered. For example, being assigned [[abyssal demon]]s in the [[Abyss]] means that the [[Abyssal Sire]] may be killed instead, but if the demons were assigned at the [[Catacombs of Kourend]], the Sire would not be an eligible option. Konar will not be able to assign special locations, such as the ability to kill [[Tormented Demon]]s as part of a [[greater demon]] assignment, since greater demons aren't found in the [[Ancient Guthixian Temple]]. Due to this, players who are seeking to kill variants of monsters are recommended to use [[Duradel]] instead.

In return for killing the assigned monsters at the location Konar specifies, players have a chance of receiving a [[brimstone key]], which can be used to open the [[brimstone chest]] next to her.

Lastly, the [[Slayer cape]] perk gives a 10% chance to be reassigned the same monster for a player's task, including the same location.

==Changes==
{{Subject changes header}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 26 March 2025
|update = Poll 83 QoL Changes
|poll = Poll 83 - Castle Wars, New Player Changes & More
|change = The [[Slayer cape]]'s perk now guarantees the same location from tasks assigned by Konar quo Maten.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 28 February 2019
|update = QoL and CoX Changes
|change = 
*Konar will no longer assign Black, Red, Blue or Green dragons within the Kourend Catacombs if the player has under 100 combat
*Konar will no longer assign Fire giants in the Waterfall Dungeon to players who haven't yet completed the Waterfall Quest
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 7 February 2019
|update = X Marks The Spot
|poll = Old School Content Poll 63: Kebos - Post Launch Changes
|change = Loot from Konar's drop table are replaced by [[brimstone key]]s; the loot has now been moved to the [[brimstone chest]] which the key accesses.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 21 January 2019
|update = Revised Post Kebos Poll Blog
|type = hotfix
|change = Konar's drop table was re-tweaked, removing [[Adamant bolts(unf)|adamant]] and [[Runite bolts (unf)|runite bolts]] and reintroducing [[dragon dart tips]] and [[magic logs]], a bug resulting in noted drops being received in unnoted form was fixed.{{CiteTwitter|author=Old School RuneScape|url=https://twitter.com/OldSchoolRS/status/1087388290397794304|date=21 January 2019|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/102716|archivedate=29 May 2020|quote="A bug resulting certain drops not appearing noted as intended has been hotfixed."}}
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 17 January 2019
|update = Kebos Graphical Changes and Other Fixes
|change = Slayer reward unlocks that apply to Konar quo Maten now correctly say so on the Slayer Unlock menu.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 14 January 2019
|update = Konar Loot Table Balancing
|type = hotfix
|change = Konar's drop table was tweaked once again. Rune drops, [[yew logs]], and [[crystal keys]] were entirely removed from the drop table. The weighting of pure essence was reduced from 5 to 1, making it a far less likely drop. Additionally, the [[Alchemical Hydra]] gained access to Konar's drop table. The Lizardman Shaman Caves for Konar Slayer tasks have been replaced with a Molch area. The caves are now covered by the Lizardmen Settlement area.{{CiteTwitter|author=Old School RuneScape|url=https://twitter.com/OldSchoolRS/status/1084834960543043585|date=14 January 2019|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/103571|archivedate=25 May 2020}}
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 11 January 2019
|update = Konar Loot Table Balancing
|change = The average value of rolling Konar's drop table was reduced by 30%, removing several drops, whilst introducing pieces of the [[Mystic robes#Dusk|Mystic robes (dusk)]] set to the drop table.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 10 January 2019
|type = hotfix
|change = An extremely rare drop of 2,500 [[Saradomin brew]]s was removed from Konar's drop table shortly after release.{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1083515413793783809|date=11 January 2019|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/103128|archivedate=29 May 2020|quote=It was there on launch, but it was removed shortly after. It was also extremely rare.}}
}}
{{Subject changes footer}}

==Trivia==
*Konar is the only confirmed female [[Kahlith]] encountered in-game.
*Konar is one of the only left-handed characters in the game.
*Konar is implied to be a major character in the short story [[Transcript:A Curious Client|A Curious Client]] from the [[Kourend Chronicles]], in which she's involved in the hiding of the [[Ancient casket]] that [[Veos]] has player find in [[X Marks the Spot]].
